Overview

What is this?

This tracks 1,642 CS2 Budapest 2025 Major stickers purchased at AUD$0.35 each from capsule openings. Total investment: AUD$574.70. The tracker fetches live prices from the Steam Market 6 times daily and monitors performance over time.

Current Status

$-266.07

Your stickers are worth A$308.63 total. You've lost 46.3% on your investment so far. You need prices to rise 46% more to break even.

Quality Tiers Explained

Stickers come in different rarities. Rarer = more valuable, fewer in circulation.

Normal (77%) Embroidered (16%) Holo (2%) Gold (1%)

Normal stickers avg A$0.040 each. Gold stickers can be worth A$10-50+ each. Historically, Gold and Holo tiers deliver the highest ROI.

Market Health

0 stickers traded in the last 24 hours across all tracked items. 50 of 378 sticker types are currently priced above your AUD$0.35 buy price. Low volume means prices may be volatile.

Prediction

Based on 20 past CS majors, sticker prices typically appreciate 6-24 months after capsule removal. Budapest stickers are ~6 months old. Prices are usually still declining at this stage — this is the accumulation window. Estimated break-even: 1 months.

What Should I Do?

HOLD

Prices are stabilising. Major sticker prices typically recover 6-12 months after a major. Patience is key — don't panic sell. Investment score: 5/10.

Market Cycle: Just Off Sale — Launch Phase — Budapest stickers are ~6 months old. Most majors are still below cost at this point. The typical break-even is 12-24 months. This is the accumulation window.

Slab Sell Strategy

Should you sell your stickers individually or encase 5 into a slab? Premium accounts for the blank slab cost (unknown). When premium > 0%, slabbing earns more. "Last Sold" = median recent sale price on Steam.

Showing top 30 by slab premium. 189 more tracked.

Slab = 5 identical stickers encased in a blank slab ($?). Total Cost = 5x sticker + blank slab. "Last Sold" = median recent sale price. Premium = (slab price - total cost) / total cost. Positive = slabbing earns more.

Quality Breakdown

About Embroidered Stickers: Embroidered is a new quality tier introduced in Budapest 2025, replacing the previous Foil finish. It sits in the Remarkable (purple) rarity slot with ~16% drop rate. Holo was promoted from Remarkable to Exotic (~3.2% drop rate), making Holos significantly rarer than before. Community reception is mixed — the 3D embroidered effect looks stunning in menus but is harder to see when applied to weapons. As the first major with this tier, Budapest 2025 Embroidered stickers could become a unique collectible if Valve changes the format again. Drop rates: Paper ~80% | Embroidered ~16% | Holo ~3.2% | Gold ~0.64%

Third-Party Market Data (Skinport)

Sales data from Skinport, a third-party CS2 marketplace. Skinport prices are ~15% lower than Steam (no seller fee), so all Skinport prices shown include a +15% markup for fair Steam parity comparison. Volume data shows additional market demand beyond Steam. Updated every price fetch.

Snapshot History (8 snapshots)

Every time prices are fetched, a snapshot is saved. Charts show day-to-day changes and cumulative P/L. The table includes predicted value at each date (based on weighted major projections) vs actual value — showing how well the prediction model tracks reality.

Value Change Per Snapshot

Historical Major Comparison (20 Majors: 2014-2025)

If you invested $574.70 AUD in stickers from each previous major (weighted by your quality mix: 77% Normal, 16% Embroidered, 2% Holo, 1% Gold). Each major has a prediction weight (shown in Weight column) — CS2-era majors weighted 60-100%, pre-2019 majors at 1-10%. Hover over weight for context notes. Sale shows how long capsules were available at 75% off — shorter sales = less supply = better returns.

Sell Timing Recommendation

SELL @ September 2035

Based on weighted historical major performance (CS2-era majors weighted highest), the optimal sell window for Budapest 2025 stickers is around 10 Years after release (~September 2035), when similar-age majors averaged +8759% ROI.

Reference majors at that age: Cologne 2014, Cologne 2015, Cluj-Napoca 2015, Columbus 2016, Cologne 2016, Krakow 2017, Boston 2018, London 2018, Katowice 2019, Berlin 2019

Capsule prices are approximate. Sale duration is the strongest predictor of capsule ROI — shorter sales = less supply = better returns. Austin 2025's 49-day sale vs Paris 2023's 146 days illustrates this clearly. Budapest's 53-day sale window (Jan 22 – Mar 15, 2026) is the 2nd shortest modern sale after Austin 2025 (49 days) — very bullish for scarcity.

Data Sources & Credits

Steam Community Market | Skinport (prices include +15% Steam fee markup) | SteamAnalyst | Swap.gg | Skinflow | CS Stash (Clash.gg) | csgoskins.gg | esportfire

Historical major data sourced from Swap.gg, esportfire, Skinflow, and csgoskins.gg research. Skinport prices adjusted +15% for Steam seller fee parity. SteamAnalyst prices converted USD→AUD at live exchange rate. This is not financial advice.
